title: AI Tools Onboarding: Your Personal Writing Assistant
description: A streamlined guide for busy executives to get set up on the top four AI platforms and configure a personal writing assistant for quick, polished communication.

modules.title: ChatGPT Setup (OpenAI)
modules.agentInstructions: Help the learner get set up on ChatGPT and configure a personal writing project.

steps.title: Create Your Account
steps.content: Go to [chat.openai.com](https://chat.openai.com) and click **Sign Up**. Use your work email or sign in directly with Google. Complete email verification if prompted. A free account is sufficient to get started.

steps.title: Create a Project
steps.content: Once logged in, look for **"Projects"** in the left sidebar and click **"New Project"**. Name it **"Personal Writing Assistant"**.

steps.title: Set Up Your Custom Instructions
steps.content:
Inside the project, click **"Custom Instructions"** and paste the following:

> *"You are my personal writing assistant. When I paste text, emails, or messages, clean them up for clarity and professionalism. Keep my tone, be concise, and don't over-formalize. Return only the edited version unless I ask for explanations."*

modules.title: Claude Setup (Anthropic)
modules.agentInstructions: Claude is excellent for nuanced writing and tone matching — a strong tool for executive communication.

steps.title: Create Your Account
steps.content: Go to [claude.ai](https://claude.ai) and click **"Sign Up"**. Use Google sign-in or your work email. Verify your email if prompted.

steps.title: Create a Project
steps.content: In the left sidebar click **"Projects"** then **"New Project"**. Name it **"Personal Writing Assistant"**.

steps.title: Set Your Project Instructions
steps.content:
Inside the project, find **"Project Instructions"** at the top of the screen and paste the following:

> *"You are my personal writing assistant. When I paste text, emails, or messages, clean them up for clarity and professionalism. Keep my tone, be concise, and don't over-formalize. Return only the edited version unless I ask for explanations."*

modules.title: Gemini Setup (Google)
modules.agentInstructions: Google's Gemini integrates seamlessly with Gmail and Google Workspace — ideal if the learner is already in the Google ecosystem.

steps.title: Create Your Account
steps.content: Go to [gemini.google.com](https://gemini.google.com). Sign in with your existing Google account. No separate sign up is needed.

steps.title: Create a Gem
steps.content: Click **"Gem Manager"** in the left sidebar, then click **"New Gem"**. Name it **"Personal Writing Assistant"**.

steps.title: Configure Your Gem Instructions
steps.content:
In the instructions field paste the following:

> *"You are my personal writing assistant. When I paste text, emails, or messages, clean them up for clarity and professionalism. Keep my tone, be concise, and don't over-formalize. Return only the edited version unless I ask for explanations."*

Click **Save** and then **"Chat with Gem"** to activate it.

modules.title: Grok Setup (xAI)
modules.agentInstructions: Grok is built by xAI and lives inside X (formerly Twitter). Great for casual, sharp and punchy communication.

steps.title: Create Your Account
steps.content: Go to [x.com](https://x.com) and sign up or log in. A free account works, though **Grok** features are more robust on **X Premium**. Consider upgrading if you plan to use it regularly.

steps.title: Access Grok
steps.content: Once logged in, find **"Grok"** in the left navigation sidebar and click it to open the interface.

steps.title: Create a Custom Grok
steps.content:
Click **"Create a Grok"** from the left panel. Name it **"Personal Writing Assistant"** and paste the following into the instructions field:

> *"You are my personal writing assistant. When I paste text, emails, or messages, clean them up for clarity and professionalism. Keep my tone, be concise, and don't over-formalize. Return only the edited version unless I ask for explanations."*

Click **Save** to finish setup.

modules.title: Quick Reference — You're All Set!
modules.agentInstructions: Wrap up with a quick reference guide the learner can use going forward.

steps.title: How to Use Each Assistant
steps.content:
Once set up, using each assistant is simple. Open the relevant project or gem, paste your text, and hit send.

**Example prompt you can use anytime:**
> *"Clean this up:"* then paste your text.

steps.title: Choosing the Right Tool
steps.content:
Use this as a quick guide:

- **ChatGPT** — Most versatile, great all-rounder
- **Claude** — Best for longer emails and nuanced tone
- **Gemini** — Best if you're working in Gmail or Google Docs
- **Grok** — Best for short, sharp, punchy messages
verificationQuestions: Which tool would you use to clean up a long, nuanced executive email?
Which tool is best suited if you live in Google Workspace?
